title: justicia parvibracteata
intro: Justicia parvibracteata, also known as the small-bracted justicia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia parvibracteata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit wound-healing properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create teas or decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
